RISK-1.title: SSE stream no server-side project filtering

RISK-2.title: server.mjs 5212 lines + dashboard.html 12347 lines no tests

RISK-4.title: improve/auto merge regressions — no contract test gate

RISK-6.title: AllowlistRule.types silent correctness gap in MonoFence AI

STEP-1.title: Server-side SSE project filtering in server.mjs

STEP-3.title: Typed API response schemas server.mjs <> dashboard.html

STEP-4.title: Integration tests for 3 highest-risk session flows

STEP-5.title: Gate improve/auto on response-shape contract tests

THEME-3.title: Field-name contract failures → typed API schemas

THEME-5.title: Test coverage gap → integration test suite

THEME-6.title: Dual-mechanism redundancy → single source of truth

THEME-7.title: Improver commit noise → commit hygiene constraints

completed.summary: Added server-side SSE/WS project filtering via ?dir= param; projectDir on StepEvent; backward-compatible (bare clients receive all)
Same fix as RISK-1 — server-side SSE project filtering in dashboard server.ts
AllowlistRule.types now filters threats by type when non-empty: empty types[]=full bypass, non-empty=suppress only listed threat types. Updated entity docstring.
Extracted STALENESS_THRESHOLD=10 constant shared by both monograph_staleness and monograph_suggest_auto. suggest_auto previously used threshold=1 causing excess rebuild pressure.

Created src/pricing/model-pricing.ts as canonical source. collector.mjs now exports _tokPrice/_tokCost and includes gpt-4o/gpt-4o-mini/gemini-2.5-pro (union). server.mjs drops duplicate _SJ_PRICING table, imports from collector.mjs.
server.ts: 30s SSE heartbeat (setInterval cleared on req close). ui.html: onerror closes stale EventSource + exponential backoff reconnect 1s→30s cap, reset to 1s on onopen.

Added __tests__/api-contracts.test.ts with 10 shape tests for RunRecord, StepEvent, session_save, session_list, /stop/:runId, session_delete. Added .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md with contract test checklist. 10/10 tests pass.
Same fix as RISK-4 — contract tests gate improve/auto merges on response-shape correctness.

Added __tests__/monograph-integration.test.ts with 10 smoke tests covering monograph_build (no-hang, force rebuild, incremental skip), monograph_query (no SQLite lock, empty results, limit cap), staleness checks (unbuilt index, fresh index, corrupt SHA), and concurrent Promise.all guard. 10/10 tests pass.

Created packages/@monomind/security/src/input-guards.ts with validateInput() covering string/number/path/url/orgName types; exported from src/index.ts. Added tsconfig.json to security package. tsc --noEmit passes cleanly.
Same fix as STEP-2 — shared validateInput() utility eliminates per-package validation drift.

Created packages/@monomind/cli/src/browser/dashboard/api-types.ts with OrgStatusResponse, RunRecord, SessionListResponse, SessionEntry, BudgetResponse, ApiError interfaces. No new tsc errors introduced.
Same fix as STEP-3 — typed API schemas make field-name regressions visible at compile time.

Added .github/SECURITY_CHECKLIST.md with 6 categories (input validation, data isolation, MonoFence AI, dependency changes, API contract, pre-merge gates). Updated PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md to link checklist for security-relevant PRs.

Added .monomind/commit-hygiene.md documenting required format, banned patterns, co-author requirement, atomic commit rules. Added .githooks/commit-msg executable validator that rejects low-signal subject lines on improve/auto branch.

Added __tests__/session-flows.test.ts with 9 tests covering SSE-before-disk race (graceful handling, <100ms queryability, idempotent duplicates), org-switch state isolation (cleared state, no SSE leak, filtered session list), and session cap enforcement (429 rejection, FIFO eviction, per-org config). All 9 tests pass in 394ms via vi.mock.
Same fix as STEP-4 — integration test suite closes the test coverage gap for the 3 highest-risk session flows.

Exported MODEL_DEFAULTS (haiku/sonnet/opus) from src/pricing/model-pricing.ts. settings-generator.ts and browser/action-builder/analyzer.ts now import MODEL_DEFAULTS instead of hardcoding model-id strings. Audit found no other dual-mechanism pricing tables beyond what STEP-7 fixed.

Created MODULARIZATION_PLAN.md for 5,185-line dist/src/ui/server.mjs. Extracted SSE client registries (sseClients, mmSseClients, broadcast, broadcastMm, add/remove/close helpers) into sse-manager.mjs (~119 lines). server.mjs imports from sse-manager.mjs replacing 15 inline call-sites. Both files pass node --check syntax gate.
Same fix as RISK-2 — server.mjs modularization begun: sse-manager.mjs is Module 1 of 5 in the extraction plan.
Same fix as RISK-2 — MODULARIZATION_PLAN.md documents 5-module extraction sequence; sse-manager.mjs proves the approach works (node --check passes, no API changes).
